current_action_id.description: Start execution from a specific action node ID instead of the trigger. Useful for testing mid-workflow actions.

globals.description: Test event data to trigger the workflow with. Object with keys like 'event', 'person', 'groups' matching the event shape.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this hog flow.

mock_async_functions.description: When true (default), async actions (HTTP requests, emails) are simulated rather than executed for safety.
